# Transcript
*******TOYARCONTOSEPIT*

ANTOSDIONYSODWROYFHGOYSIO
MMATEYESKIROFORIWNOSENHIK

THSPRYTANEIASEKKLHSIATWNPRO

LAMPTREYSKAISYMPROEDROIEDOXE
